reservar.datosTitulo: Review your visit and share your details
reservar.datosDescripcion: Make sure your selection is correct. Your contact details will be used to follow up on this request.
reservar.datosProtegidos: Your contact details are not stored in browser storage. They are only sent when you confirm the request.
reservar.errorConsultaCierresDescripcion: You can keep selecting your visit. Availability and price will be validated again before the request is sent.
reservar.sinConexion: It looks like you're offline. Your details are still here; reconnect and try again.
reservar.errorEnvioTitulo: The request has not been confirmed yet
reservar.errorEnvioDescripcion: Your details are still in the form. Check your connection and try again; we'll reuse the same operation to avoid duplicate requests.
reservar.enviandoAyuda: Wait for confirmation and keep this screen open.

confirmacion.guardarFolio: Keep this confirmation number to identify your request.
confirmacion.queSigueDescripcion: The EjiXhole team will review the request and contact you using the details you shared.
